description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a solid dark fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The legs are short, block-style, and barely visible, suggesting a low-profile design that keeps the sofa close to the ground. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy three-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, uniform loose cushions, and smooth dark upholstery. The design is minimalist and low-profile, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's full width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the continuous, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions arranged in a single row, all similarly sized and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, mostly recessed and minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, matte fabric with no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
